content: Interested and qualified applicants can send their research proposal, CV, two written samples or publications, and one page personal motivation statement by no later than December 15, 2025 to csrchr@outlook.com. For more details, find attached the ToR on our telegram channel. https://lnkd.in/eg4Mtcrd

postedAt.postedAgoText: 3 months ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

content:
The Civil Society Fund Plus (CSF Plus) Programme, funded by the European Union (EU), is implemented by Christian Aid in partnership with the Ethiopian Civil Society Organizations Forum (ECSF), the Civil Society Resource Center (CSRC), and the Chura Abugida Artistic Association (CAAA).

The four-year programme operates across the Addis Ababa City Administration, Central Ethiopia, South Ethiopia, and Tigray Regional States. The partnership is pleased to announce an open call for Expressions of Interest (EOI) from smaller and emerging local and grassroots CSOs working to advance the social and economic well-being of marginalized communities and to promote governance, democracy, peacebuilding, and human rights at the regional, zonal, and woreda levels. 
For more information, please find the call on our telegram channel. https://lnkd.in/eAcabSKy

postedAt.postedAgoText: 4 months ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

author.name: Louis-Antoine Souchet
author.info: Country Director for Ethiopia & Representative to the African Union Agence Française de Développement በፈረንሳይ ልማት ኤጀንሲ የኢትዮጲያ እና የአፍሪካ ኅብረት ዳይሬክተር

content:
🇪🇹🙋🏾‍♀️🙋🏾‍♂️🇫🇷

Excellent quality of #dialogue during a frank and constructive discussion (3 hours!) at ACSO’s office between Deputy CEO Fassikaw Molla Amera, his team, and the six consortia leaders of Civil Society Innovation Fund Ethiopia (CSIF) 2:

✔️ Yebego Adragot Driget (EURIKA)
✔️ Center for Advancement of Rights and Democracy 
✔️ Civil Society Resource Center 
✔️ Lawyers for Human Rights - የሕግ ባለሙያዎች ለሰብዓዊ መብቶች
✔️ MERSA Media Institute 
✔️ CECOE | Coalition of Ethiopian Civil Society Organizations for Elections

Each consortia presented their projects and expected outcomes 🎯

In these times of growing #polarization, tensions between communities, rising hate speech, such #grassroot level projects, deeply connected with local #communities all across #Ethiopia, are more useful than ever to reduce social tensions and enable peaceful and sustainable development

They will strongly contribute, using #innovative approaches, to improve access to reliable information, fact-checking capacities, foster dialogue between communities, peacebuilding and conflict prevention initiatives, community engagement, women empowerment & political participation, support to victims of gender based violence, and much more

It was a great occasion to initiate an open and smooth brainstorming to have a better common understanding, increase mutual #trust and #transparency, find modalities and a framework for #CSOs to better engage with ACSO and government institutions, find practical solutions to practical challenges, and collectively improve and 💪 strengthen the civic space

As #partners of both the ethiopian government and the ethiopian civil society, we are very pleased at AFD - Agence Française de Développement 🇫🇷 that this project can serve as a #platform 🔄 to support this renewed dialogue and collaboration 🤝

To be continued very 🔜!

Embassy of France in Ethiopia 
Agence Française de Développement in Eastern Africa 
Guilhem Arnal | Léonie Claeyman | Caroline Huinh Van | Olivier Hart de Keating | Alexis Maclet | Jebessa Senbeta | MannionDaniels | Catherine Wanjiku | Paul Knipe | Mary Healy

CECOE | Coalition of Ethiopian Civil Society Organizations for Elections
Agence Française de Développement in Eastern Africa

content:
The Civil Society Resource Center (CSRC) is inviting recent graduates with disabilities to apply for the Emerging Civil Society Leaders Fellowship Program. This six-month fellowship offers hands-on experience in the operations of civil society organizations (CSOs).
We are looking for recent graduates in Law or related fields from recognized universities in the country. The fellow will be placed in an organization working on the rights of persons with disabilities.
Interested candidates can submit their CV and cover letter to kiya.fule@csrc-et.org, with a copy to contact@csrc-et.org.

The deadline for submission is on November 3, 2025.

content:
The Civil Society Fund Plus (CSF Plus) Programme, financed by the European Union (EU), aims to promote a vibrant, inclusive, and independent civil society that contributes to participatory governance, democratic engagement, and open dialogue between citizens and policymakers.
Christian Aid, in partnership with Ethiopian Civil Society Organizations Forum (ECSF), Civil Society Resource Center (CSRC), and Chura Abugida Artistic Association (CAAA), is implementing the four-year programme in Addis Ababa City Administration, Central Ethiopia, South Ethiopia, and Tigray Regional States.Christian Aid and its co-beneficiaries are pleased to announce an open call for Expressions of Interest (EOI) targeting smaller and emerging local and grassroots CSOs working to advance the social and economic well-being of marginalized communities and to promote governance, democracy, peacebuilding, and human rights at regional, zonal, and woreda levels. 
For more information, please find attached the official call on our telegram channel. https://lnkd.in/eAcabSKy

postedAt.postedAgoText: 9 months ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

content:
On Saturday, October 11th, Youth for Human Rights Ethiopia conducted a Basic Human Rights Training at the Civil Society Resource Centre (CSRC). The session created an engaging platform for young participants to learn, reflect, and exchange ideas on the fundamental principles that uphold human dignity and equality.

We at the Civil Society Resource Centre (CSRC) were delighted to host this important initiative and support efforts that strengthen civic awareness and participation. We extend our heartfelt appreciation to Youth for Human Rights Ethiopia for their commitment and leadership in advancing human rights education among youth.#HumanRights #YouthEmpowerment #CSRC #CivicEngagement #Ethiopia

postedAt.postedAgoText: 5 months ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

repost.content:
We extend our sincere gratitude to all the dedicated individuals who attended our Basic Human Rights Training on Saturday, October 18th. The session was a resounding success, providing a vital platform for education and dialogue on the fundamental principles that underpin our society.
We would also like to express our special appreciation to the Civil Society Resource Centre (CSRC) for their invaluable partnership and support. Their collaboration was instrumental in the success of this event.
We were particularly impressed by the high level of engagement and the insightful contributions from all participants. We are confident that the knowledge shared will empower attendees to serve as effective advocates for justice and dignity in their respective communities.
Thank you for your commitment to advancing human rights education.


#HumanRights #ProfessionalDevelopment #Advocacy #CivicEducation #Training #Ethiopia #CSRC

postedAt.postedAgoText: 5 months ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

content:
We are pleased to share that the project titled “Strengthening the Capacities, Independence, and Credibility of Local and Grassroots CSOs as Actors of Good Governance and Development in Ethiopia” has officially been launched!

The project is generously funded by the European Union in Ethiopia and led by Christian Aid, in partnership with the Civil Society Resource Center (CSRC), the Ethiopian Civil Society Organizations Forum (ECSF) , and Chora Abugida Artistic Association. As a key grant partner, CSRC leads project implementation in Addis Ababa and the Central Ethiopia region, where we will support emerging and grassroots CSOs through targeted capacity building, mentorship, and sub-granting schemes aimed at enhancing their role in governance and development processes.

This marks the beginning of multi-year journey to empower local actors, strengthen civic space, and promote accountable, inclusive development across Ethiopia.

#EUCSFPlus #CivilSocietyEthiopia #CSOCapacity #GoodGovernance #ChristianAid #CSRC #ECSF #ChoraAbugida #EUinEthiopia #CivicEngagement #DevelopmentPartners

This initiative is supported by funding from  Agence Française de Développement (AFD) through the Ethiopian Civil Society Engagement Program (ECSEP).
